h1.visual_description: Bold, large serif font, left-aligned, positioned below the page header and above the main body text.

visual_matchers.pattern: Superscript number at the start of a paragraph in a smaller font size at the bottom of the page.
Horizontal rule spanning the width of the text block near the bottom of the page.
Text and page numbers (often Roman numerals) positioned above a top horizontal rule.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (inline using $...$ and display blocks for centered equations)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top running headers containing section titles (e.g., 'Prologue') and page numbers (e.g., 'xvii') separated by a horizontal line.
